title: David
tmdbOverview: From the songs of his mother’s heart to the whispers of a faithful God, David’s story begins in quiet devotion. When the giant Goliath rises to terrorize a nation, a young shepherd armed with only a sling, a few stones, and unshakable faith steps forward. Pursued by power and driven by purpose, his journey tests the limits of loyalty, love, and courage—culminating in a battle not just for a crown, but for the soul of a kingdom.
synopsis: David is a 2025 animation, drama and family film from United States and United Kingdom. It carries a 6.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
